crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority accounting task.

crons.name: ar-digest
crons.prompt: Run the ar-rent-posting skill in digest mode: read ledgers, verify payment application, and prepare the delinquency-feed draft. Do not post adjustments or contact residents.

crons.name: bank-rec-am
crons.prompt: Run trust-reconciliation in morning verify-and-flag mode. Bank=book=liability only; no ledger corrections or money movement.

crons.name: bank-rec-pm
crons.prompt: Run trust-reconciliation in evening verify-and-flag mode. Surface changed breaks only; no ledger corrections or money movement.

crons.name: owner-statements-monthly
crons.prompt: Run owner-statement-drafting for the prior month: draft explainable statements and owner-draw recommendations. Draws are approval-gated.

crons.name: deposit-deadline-watch
crons.prompt: Run security-deposit-accounting deadline review. Draft alerts only; deposit returns are approval-gated.
